1 TLPL471 and TLPL479B are taken concurrently

Option III: Government and Politics

The Government and Politics program is under review. Please check with the Government Department regarding speciﬁc course work.

This option is primarily for those teacher candidates earning their initial degree. Requires a minimum of 65 credit hours of preprofessional/ subject area course work. Thirty-six hours must be in GVPT. At least eighteen of the thirty-six credit hours must be upper-level courses.

Secondary Education Major - Social Studies

All GVPT majors must also complete an approved skills option (a foreign language or three quantitative courses from a select list - see GVPT advising ofﬁce.)

In addition, the GVPT program is a Limited Enrollment Program (LEP). See GVPT advisor for speciﬁc admission requirements.
